parameters.query:
SELECT 
  DATE(created_at) as report_date,
  COUNT(*) as total_discrepancies,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) as medium_severity,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'LOW' THEN 1 END) as low_severity,
  COALESCE(SUM(revenue_impact), 0) as total_revenue_impact,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_impact > 0 THEN revenue_impact ELSE 0 END), 0) as revenue_overcharge,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_impact < 0 THEN ABS(revenue_impact) ELSE 0 END), 0) as revenue_undercharge,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RESOLVED' THEN 1 END) as resolved_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' THEN 1 END) as pending_review
FROM revenue_discrepancies 
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
ORDER BY report_date DESC;

SELECT 
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  COUNT(*) as discrepancy_count,
  AVG(variance_percentage) as avg_variance_pct,
  SUM(revenue_impact) as total_impact,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity_count
FROM revenue_discrepancies 
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY revenue_line, currency
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY discrepancy_count DESC, ABS(SUM(revenue_impact)) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  'current_hour' as time_period,
  COUNT(*) as discrepancies_last_hour,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity_last_hour,
  COALESCE(SUM(ABS(revenue_impact)), 0) as revenue_impact_last_hour
FROM revenue_discrepancies 
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 hour'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'current_day' as time_period,
  COUNT(*) as discrepancies_today,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity_today,
  COALESCE(SUM(ABS(revenue_impact)), 0) as revenue_impact_today
FROM revenue_discrepancies 
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'pending_review' as time_period,
  COUNT(*) as pending_items,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity_pending,
  COALESCE(SUM(ABS(revenue_impact)), 0) as pending_revenue_impact
FROM revenue_discrepancies 
WHERE status = 'PENDING_REVIEW';

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO revenue_assurance_audit (
  total_transactions_processed,
  valid_transactions,
  discrepancies_found,
  high_severity_issues,
  total_revenue_impact,
  started_at,
  completed_at
) 
SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(total_discrepancies), 0) as total_transactions_processed,
  0 as valid_transactions,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_discrepancies), 0) as discrepancies_found,
  COALESCE(SUM(high_severity), 0) as high_severity_issues,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_revenue_impact), 0) as total_revenue_impact,
  CURRENT_DATE as started_at,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as completed_at
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_discrepancies,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1 END) as high_severity,
    SUM(revenue_impact) as total_revenue_impact
  FROM revenue_discrepancies 
  WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
) daily_stats;
